comment: 风格圣经:所有 AI 出图提示词的唯一规范来源。v1 已通过风格探索并锁定;之后所有风格调整只改此文件并升级版本。每张卡最终 prompt = global_style + composition[卡型] + factions[阵营] + 卡牌 art_prompt。正式生成必须同时引用 anchors.images 中的三张锚点图以保持跨卡牌一致性。
global_style: tabletop wargame illustration, painterly oil brushwork with visible strokes, weathered battlefield field-journal aesthetic, muted cool grey and warm umber palette with luminous dust accents of faded teal and old gold, matte texture, grounded military-fantasy tone, high detail
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, watermark, signature, logo, card frame, border, user interface, photorealistic photo, 3d render, anime, cel shading, glossy plastic, oversaturated neon colors, cropped limbs, extra characters not described

composition.unit: character art: single full-body primary figure or one rider-and-mount unit, three-quarter view, centered, entire figure visible including feet or paws, standing over a subtle ground shadow, plain softly-blurred smoky background for clean silhouette cutout, dramatic rim light from upper left; if the subject mentions additional allies, comrades, enemies, packmates, or targets beyond the primary figure or rider-and-mount unit, keep them as distant softly blurred secondary silhouettes fully separated from and never overlapping the primary silhouette
composition.order: wide landscape 3:2 composition, dynamic action vignette with one strong focal point, painterly battlefield moment, edges of the scene softly blurred and darkened, no full landscape, composition reads clearly at small size
composition.leader: waist-up heroic portrait, three-quarter view, commanding presence, centered, plain smoky background, dramatic rim light, face and emblem clearly readable inside a circular crop
composition.board: wide landscape 3:2 composition, top-down view of a completely empty weathered military campaign table, worn canvas and leather map surface with faint terrain stains, low contrast, heavily desaturated, subdued detail so game pieces stand out, evenly lit, no miniatures, no standees, no tokens, no dice, no cards, no weapons, no tools, no loose props anywhere on the playing surface or around its edges, no grid lines, no icons, no text
composition.key_art: wide cinematic key art composition, two opposing focal figures facing off, dramatic backlight through dust and embers, upper center area kept clear and simple for logo placement
composition.card_back: game UI asset: portrait trading card back design, perfectly symmetrical, flat front view, single centered crest, ornamental border, isolated, no text
composition.ui_frame: game UI asset: flat front view, perfectly symmetrical ornamental design, isolated on plain neutral dark background, crisp clean edges suitable for nine-slice scaling, no text, the inner window area left plain and empty
composition.ui_button: game UI asset: wide landscape button plate, flat front view, perfectly symmetrical, isolated on plain neutral dark background, crisp clean edges suitable for nine-slice scaling, plain uninterrupted center surface for programmatic text, simple uniform side rails and corners, restrained decoration only at the four corners, no crest, no wings, no protruding side ornaments, no text
composition.ui_icon: game UI icon: single centered emblem, flat front view, isolated on plain neutral dark background, bold silhouette that stays readable at 64 pixels, no text
composition.ui_texture: seamless flat surface texture filling the whole frame, even lighting, subtle low-contrast detail, no objects, no figures, no text
composition.prop: square canvas game asset, single game prop object, centered, slight top-down angle, isolated on plain neutral dark background, generous even padding on all sides, even soft lighting, no text
composition.screen_bg: wide 16:9 game interface background, environment-only composition, low contrast and darkened center-safe lighting so foreground UI remains readable, atmospheric depth, no people, no text, no interface elements
composition.fx: game visual-effect sprite, single centered effect with a bold readable silhouette, isolated with generous transparent safety padding, no text, no border, no interface elements

iron_vow.name: 铁誓
iron_vow.block: Iron Vow faction: disciplined human soldiery in steel-grey plate armor, tower shields and banners etched with oaths, ember-gold oath-flame emblems, fortress and rampart motifs, cool steel blue-grey palette with ember gold accents

wildpack.name: 野群
wildpack.block: Wildpack faction: feral orc and beast-rider war-band, hide and fur armor, bone and feather totems, streaked war-paint, kicked-up dust and motion, warm hide-brown palette with feral green and bone-white accents

neutral.name: 中立
neutral.block: unaligned wanderers and mercenaries of the frontier, weathered leather and patched cloth, mixed scavenged gear, muted bronze and faded ochre palette, no faction emblem

duskweaver.name: 黄昏教团
duskweaver.block: Duskweaver faction: dusk-purple and charcoal-black palette with ember orange-red glow accents, drifting ash particles, ragged ritual robes, obsidian trims

undervault.name: 掘世匠会
undervault.block: Undervault faction: gunmetal grey and polished brass palette with furnace-orange glow accents, rivets and gears and steam pipes, heavy industrial dwarven craftsmanship

extra_assets.art_prompt: a war-room campaign table surface for a 5x4 grid battlefield, subtle scorch marks and old supply-route stains, cool grey field with warm umber edges

an iron-clad commander with a planted greatshield on the left confronting a wildpack warchief raising a great curved horn on the right, torn banners and drifting battle-dust between them across a trench line
weathered leather and steel plate card back, a crossed tower-shield and bone horn crest at center, thin old-gold filigree border, cool grey and warm umber

portrait trading card frame of weathered steel with ember-gold oath-flame filigree, rectangular empty artwork window in the upper two thirds, plain text panel in the lower third, cool steel blue-grey with ember gold accents

portrait trading card frame of lashed bone, hide leather and feather totems, rectangular empty artwork window in the upper two thirds, plain text panel in the lower third, warm hide-brown with feral green and bone-white accents

portrait trading card frame of plain weathered bronze and patched leather straps, rectangular empty artwork window in the upper two thirds, plain text panel in the lower third, muted bronze and faded ochre

portrait trading card frame using the exact same window and panel geometry as the existing faction frames, rectangular empty artwork window spanning 16.5% to 84% width and 15.2% to 68.8% height, plain text panel below, dusk-purple and charcoal-black surfaces with restrained ember-orange outline and obsidian corner trims

portrait trading card frame using the exact same window and panel geometry as the existing faction frames, rectangular empty artwork window spanning 16.5% to 84% width and 15.2% to 68.8% height, plain text panel below, gunmetal-grey surfaces with polished brass rivets and restrained industrial corner details
a round faceted supply-gem of deep faded teal set in a worn old-gold ring
a crossed-swords emblem stamped on a warm umber metal boss
a deep blood-red teardrop gem set in a weathered steel ring
faction crest: an ember-gold oath-flame rising over a steel-grey tower shield
faction crest: a bone-white wolf skull with trailing feathers on a hide-brown field
faction crest: an inverted ember-orange flame suspended inside a circular ring of drifting embers, bold simple silhouette readable in one color
faction crest: the circular muzzle cross-section of a heavy cannon embraced by a brass gear, bold simple silhouette readable in one color
aged field-journal parchment, faint stains, creases and worn edges, warm pale umber
a wide rectangular metal button plate with riveted edges, weathered steel with a subtle ember-gold trim line
a simple oval wooden miniature standee base, weathered dark wood with a thin old-gold rim
a torn but defiant banner raised high over a held trench line at dawn, warm gold light breaking through smoke
a shattered shield half-buried in mud beside a fallen banner, cold grey dusk, embers dying out
war-room strategy table with scattered blank card parchments, quill and ink, candle-lit workshop, top-down oblique view
grand hall of war banners and ranked trophy pedestals, shafts of dusty light, empty of people
tall dark leather-bound ledger panel with brass corners, restrained ornate border, plain uninterrupted center, stretch-safe textured edges
very wide horizontal dark wood-and-iron nameplate strip, subtle engraved border, plain uninterrupted center, stretch-safe textured edges
circular military rank medallion with a restrained laurel and sword motif, dark bronze, empty center disc
gold war medal with a short dark ribbon, flat front view
silver war medal with a short dark ribbon, flat front view
bronze war medal with a short dark ribbon, flat front view
circular arcane wax seal with a crossed-banners emblem and engraved outer ring
glowing faded-teal energy bolt pointing exactly right with a short horizontal motion trail
radial melee impact spark burst, warm orange-white, compact center and sharp rays
small round shield sigil glowing cool blue, flat front view
neutral grey heraldic emblem combining a crossed banner and coin motif, bold silhouette
aged field-journal parchment sheet panel with darkened worn edges, faint creases and stains, thin restrained old-gold corner mounts, plain uninterrupted center surface, warm pale umber
a very wide horizontal engraved steel and dark wood title banner plate, subtle ember-gold trim lines along the rails, restrained rivets at both ends
a round riveted weathered-steel button boss with a subtle ember-gold rim ring and a plain empty center disc
a square deployment slot frame stenciled into a weathered war-table surface, thin worn painted border with small corner tick marks, very low contrast, faded and scuffed, center completely empty
a fanned trio of playing cards emblem stamped in worn steel
a neat squared stack of cards emblem stamped in worn steel
a rising swirl of luminous faded-teal dust sparks emblem, bold silhouette
a clockwork automaton knight helmet emblem stamped in worn steel
two crossed war banners above a round table emblem stamped in worn steel
a signal beacon tower radiating three arcs emblem stamped in worn steel
a leather-bound card ledger with a buckled strap emblem stamped in worn steel
a weathered wooden signpost arrow emblem stamped in worn steel
two curved arrows chasing each other in a circle emblem stamped in worn steel
a cresting wave over an hourglass emblem stamped in worn steel
a heavy iron cogwheel emblem stamped in worn steel
a wide rectangular polished brass and warm gold button plate with riveted edges and a subtle raised bevel, bright gold face catching soft light
a quill pen crossing a playing card emblem stamped in worn steel
a compact plain weathered steel button plate with one thin border line and four small corner rivets, minimal decoration

a wide landscape aged parchment sheet window panel framed by ornate weathered gold-bronze corner brackets and thin metal rails, darkened worn edges, faint creases, plain uninterrupted parchment center, warm pale umber
an engraved dark bronze title plaque with rounded ends, a thin old-gold border line and two mounting rivets

anchors.comment: v1 风格锚点:铁誓单体、野群单体、铁誓指令场景。正式批量生产时所有生成均引用这三张图作为 style reference。
